case_title: ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC VS. BRITTANY JOHNSON et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, BRITTANY DOES 1 TO 100, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-17-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC SERVED NOV-18-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, BRITTANY
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-14-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-14-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST ERICA L. BRACHFELD, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-14-2009, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-29-2009. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-14-2009 CONTINUED TO JAN-13-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES LLC
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-13-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JAN-13-2010 AT 1:30PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
